---
title: "test_debug_fishtest.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_debug_fishtest.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.75
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 6.92
overall_score: 4.56
---

## Intent
The `test_debug_fishtest.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_run_debug_fishtest_logic, MockEngine, __init__, search, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, build_index, test_run_debug_fishtest_missing_file. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_run_debug_fishtest_logic, MockEngine, __init__, search, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, build_index, test_run_debug_fishtest_missing_file. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.tools.debug.debug_fishtest](file://src.tools.debug.debug_fishtest)

### Exports
- `test_run_debug_fishtest_logic`
- `MockEngine`
- `__init__`
- `search`
- `load_core_skills`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
- `build_index`
- `test_run_debug_fishtest_missing_file`
